description_long: This object consists of three sets of curtains, each mounted on a horizontal rod. The central curtain is a rich reddish-brown color, while the two flanking curtains are a muted grayish-brown. Each curtain set is composed of two panels that hang vertically and are slightly pleated, giving them a textured appearance. The tops of the curtains feature evenly spaced loops or tabs that slide over the rod, creating a uniform, gathered look. The rods appear to be metallic and are supported at both ends, suggesting a sturdy installation. The curtains are opaque and made from a fabric material, suitable for providing privacy or blocking light in a residential or urban setting.
description: Three sets of pleated curtains in brown and gray tones hang from metal rods, each with looped tops for mounting. The curtains are opaque and textured, suitable for privacy or light control.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three curtain sets with visible pleats, color differences, and looped tops on rods.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the curtains and rods, with minimal fabric thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the back sides of the curtain panels and rods.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and alignment of the curtain sets.
